---
applyTo: "components/**/*.ts,components/**/*.tsx,features/**/components/**/*.tsx"
---

# UI instructions

- Keep UI token-driven and consistent with the existing design system.
- Prefer shadcn/ui primitives when a shared UI primitive is needed.
- Do not create decorative complexity without functional value.
- Keep admin UI simple, readable, and usable by a non-technical user.
- Do not put business logic in presentation components.
- Prefer clear spacing, accessible forms, and stable responsive layouts.
- Avoid one-off styling patterns when an existing token or component pattern already solves the need.
- Prefer sobriety over visual noise.
